bv_diagnostic_value: High - strongly associated with BV and genital inflammation
notes: Still uncultured (Clostridiales). Not in cpnDB. 16S-based detection only.

bv_diagnostic_value: Best single BV marker - 98.8% sensitivity combined with Megasphaera
notes: Formally named Acetatifactor indicium. cpn60 may detect but 16S PCR is validated.

bv_diagnostic_value: High - 98.8% sens / 93.7% spec when combined with BVAB2
notes: Distinguished from Megasphaera type 2 only by specific PCR. Linked to preterm birth and PPROM.
Formerly Atopobium vaginae. Reclassified to Fannyhessea vaginae. Both names appear in literature.
